title: Marcom Executive
description:
Our client is a well-established, reputable members-based institution in Singapore, recognised for its heritage, strong brand presence and high standards of service. With a diverse calendar of events and activities, the organisation places strong emphasis on member engagement, brand stewardship and meaningful communications.

Key Responsibilities

  • Support the planning and execution of marketing and communications initiatives across online and offline channels

  • Assist in creating and coordinating content for member communications, including EDMs, newsletters, website updates, mobile app content and printed materials

  • Support the promotion of club events, programmes and initiatives to drive member engagement and participation

  • Assist with corporate communications and brand messaging to ensure consistency across all touchpoints

  • Liaise with internal departments to gather information, coordinate timelines and support communication needs

  • Coordinate with external vendors and agencies (e.g. designers, printers, media partners) on assigned projects

  • Track basic campaign performance metrics and assist in preparing reports and post-campaign summaries

  • Provide general marketing and administrative support to the marketing team as required

Requirements

  • Diploma or Degree in Marketing, Communications, Mass Communications or a related discipline

  • 1–3 years of experience in marketing, communications or a related role (fresh graduates with relevant internships may be considered)

  • Strong written communication skills with good attention to detail

  • Familiarity with digital channels such as EDM platforms, websites or social media is an advantage

  • Interest in hospitality, lifestyle, leisure or membership-based environments is a plus

  • Organised, proactive and able to manage multiple tasks in a structured environment

  • A team player with a positive attitude and willingness to learn

Why Join

  • Join a reputable and heritage-rich organisation with a strong brand presence

  • Exposure to integrated marketing communications across multiple channels

  • Opportunity to develop marketing skills in a professional, member-focused environment

    Working Location: Thomson
    Working Hours: Mon- Fri 8.30am- 5.30pm

    To apply, kindly click APPLY NOW to submit your latest CV in Microsoft Words.

    We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.


    SATT

    EA Registration No.: R1219605

    EA License No.: 25C2695

postedCompany.description:
At Search Avenue Pte Ltd, we believe recruitment is more than just filling positions — it’s about building futures. Founded by two passionate individuals with over 12 years of recruitment experience, Search Avenue was born out of a shared vision: to raise the standards of recruitment through integrity, innovation, and unwavering dedication to people.

We are deeply committed to understanding the evolving needs of both employers and candidates. Our approach combines advanced technology with a human touch, ensuring personalized, efficient, and meaningful hiring experiences. Whether it’s permanent placements, executive searches, or talent mapping, our mission remains the same — to connect top-tier talent with companies that value diversity, capability, and culture fit.

Driven by our founders’ belief in work-life harmony, we champion flexible career opportunities and inclusive workplaces. Our goal is to empower individuals to thrive in their careers while honoring their personal commitments — and to help businesses grow stronger through passionate, high-performing teams.

At Search Avenue, recruitment is our craft — and people are our purpose.
postedCompany.name: SEARCH AVENUE PRIVATE LIMITED
